LanguageData.UB_SNS_IslandSurvivor.title: Shipwreck survivor
LanguageData.UB_SNS_IslandSurvivor.description: [PAWN_nameDef] crashlanded on this rimworld on a remote island off of the mainland. There, [PAWN_nameDef] struggled to survive day in and day out, barely scraping by on food and fending off predators through the harsh weather. [PAWN_pronoun] was eventually rescued, but they never recovered from the mental toll of years of complete isolation.
